One-click lead research

Research Leads in One Click

ProspectPilot turns any LinkedIn profile or company website into a rich lead record. Save prospects, get company intelligence, and generate personalized outreach — all from your browser.

Start Free See How It Works

No credit card required · 20 free leads/month

How It Works

Three clicks from browsing to actionable lead intelligence.

Step 01

Browse & Click

Visit any LinkedIn profile or company website. Click the ProspectPilot button in your browser toolbar.

Step 02

We Research

We extract key details — name, title, company, tech stack, industry, size — and enrich the data instantly.

Step 03

Save & Engage

Your prospect is saved to your dashboard. Generate a personalized outreach message and export anytime.

Everything You Need

Stop switching between tabs. Do all your lead research in one place.

One-Click Save

Save leads from LinkedIn or any company website with a single click.

Company Intel

Company industry, size, description, and tech stack automatically detected.

Contact Details

Names, titles, locations, and LinkedIn URLs extracted from profiles.

AI Outreach

Generate personalized email/LinkedIn messages for each lead.

CSV Export

Export all your leads to CSV for your CRM or spreadsheet.

Search & Filter

Find any saved prospect by name, company, or title instantly.

Simple Pricing

Start free. Upgrade when you outgrow it.

  • Basic company info
  • Dashboard access
  • Browser extension
  • CSV export
